distance_km.note: No web sources found for 'Pirin Ultra Nordic' cross-country ski race with 50km distance; results describe 'Pirin Ultra' as a running ultramarathon with distances 25km, 38km, 68km, 160km.

elevation_m.note: No sources confirm 900m elevation for a 50km cross-country ski race named Pirin Ultra Nordic.

country.note: Pirin Ultra (running) is in Bulgaria, but no confirmation for ski race 'Pirin Ultra Nordic'.

region.note: Pirin Ultra running race in Bansko, Blagoevgrad province, Bulgaria, but no ski race match.

discipline.note: No sources for classic skiing in Pirin Ultra Nordic; Pirin Ultra is trail running/skyrunning.

field_size.note: No participant numbers found for Pirin Ultra Nordic ski race.

founded.note: Pirin Ultra running race first edition 2016, not 2018, and not a ski race.

website.note: https://www.bulskilodge.bg not confirmed as official site for Pirin Ultra Nordic; Pirin Ultra running site is https://www.pirinultra.com.

race_date.note: No late February date for ski race; Pirin Ultra running in early-mid September.
